insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure future compatibility.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility. The deprecation does not immediately break existing extensions, but it is crucial to update them to avoid future issues. Developers can use alternative APIs or hooks to achieve similar functionality.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions if they are not updated to remove the deprecated hook and capability. This could lead to a poor user experience or errors during the checkout process.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook is significant because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are crucial for merchants to customize their checkout experience. Developers must update their extensions to ensure they remain compatible with future API versions.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 requires FixedAmount line item discounts to represent per-unit discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to Action extensions, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released with updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload validation, and long URL wrapping fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region Markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting from version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS Extensions, App Pricing, and Flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. These updates enable more flexible and powerful POS integrations.

themes.title: App Pricing and Partnerships
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started to ensure trust in the ecosystem.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and API updates
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The Customer Account API has also been updated, with the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types in version 2026-10.

actions.text: Update POS Extensions to use the new background extension target
Review and comply with updated App Store Requirements, including policy 1.3
Migrate to Customer Account API version 2026-10 before the removal of deprecated fields
